column2: Get up here, steal anything you like. You're in Hell! How much worse could it get?
Okay guys, first come first serve.
Hey, you did it. Get up here, grab some free crap, you earned it.
Hey, you're the best! All right, grab some free crap and get out of here. I got a lot of devil stuff to do. Pow zoop!
Oh oh man, that was quick! You guys are some bad dudes! All right, here are some parting gifts, cause you gotta go.
Okay, let's go guys! I gotta close up Hell. It's not a 7-Eleven." (laughs) "Grab some gifts before you go, bye you guys!
Ooh, that did not take long, you guys are some crazy nuts guys, let me tell you! Okay let's see here. Oh yeah, got some gifts for you.
Okay, we'll talk here for a minute guys. You, you guys are the real heroes of Hell. Here, I have bunches of gifts. Go ahead with the serving.
Okay, good stuff, now get out of here you knuckleheads!" (whispering) "I love you guys.
Man, they're going to make you guys the Devil!" (laughs evilly) "Not really though, because that's me and I'm the best. Go ahead and have some gifts and get out of here, you crazy guys.

Guys, guys guys guys. Let me get real with you for a minute. This is why I got into the Devil business. You, you crazy nuts guys, tearing each other apart like animals." (tearfully) "I think I got a burning cinder in my eye or something. Get some gifts and get out of here you nuts.
Okay, good stuff! Get up here, grab a gift, the Devil's a little busy here. I got to go rig an election with Quebec. A local election, but you know, I'm the Devil. I've got to sweat the small stuff.

Okay good, you're done! Man I hate goodbyes. Luckily we're in Hell, so nobody ever gets to leave." (laughs jubilantly) "Except you guys! You guys are so special, guys. Oh good, I got some special gifts! Then you gotta go.
Oh man, that was great, you guys! Man, we are all having a go- Well, not everybody. But we are having a good time in Hell, ah? Good times, yes. Good Hell times. Grab your gifts!
Oh man, you guys are some scary bad dudes, I'm so scared!" (chuckles) "Come on, I'm the Devil! You kidding me? Take your free crap and get out of here.
Hey, there you are. Here's a gift.
There he is. Here's some free crap.
Hey, you won! Grab some stuff. It's free.
Welcome to Hell! Now fight to the death. Whaddya gonna do?
Hey, welcome to Hell! Holy crap, it's you guys! Hey, you guys. Hey, pow zoop. Fight to the death.
Hey, it's me, the Bombinomicon. Guess what, guys? You're in Hell! It's good stuff. You're gonna like it here! Okay, now fight to the death.
Hey, welcome to Hell! How are you guys doing? That's great, now fight to the death.
Hey hey! You made it! Welcome to Hell. Free stuff for everybody...who is still alive in a minute. Hey, it's Hell, what are ya gonna do?
Hey, it's me, the Bombinomicon. Guess what, guys? You're in Hell. It's good stuff. You're gonna like it here.
Hey hey! It's me, the Bombinomicon. Guess what? I'm the Devil! Now fight to the death.
Hey hey! It's me, the Bombinomicon. I'm the Devil now, welcome to Hell.
Hey guys, up here! It's me, the bomb book, from last year! Welcome to Hell! Okay, now fight to the death.
Hey, welcome to Hell! How are you guys doing? That's great, now fight to the death.
Hey, it's you guys! Hey, guess where you are? Hell! Yes, pretty good.
Guess what guys? You're in Hell. It's good stuff, you're gonna like it here! Now fight to the death.
Hey, it's me the Bombinomicon. Bad news, you're in Hell. Good news, I'm the Devil! Hey, pow zoop." *laughs merrily* "Fight to the death!
Hey hey, guys, it's me, the bomb book! Welcome to Hell! Okay, now fight to the death.
Hey, it's you guys! Welcome to Hell! Pow zoop! Go crazy nuts.
Hey, it's me the Bombinomicon. You guys gonna have a lot of fun in Hell. It's Hell, everybody likes it! Fight to the death.
Hey hey! It's me, the Bombinomicon. I'm the Devil now." (laughs eagerly) "Fight to the death.
Hey, it's me, the Bombinomicon. Guess what, I'm the Devil! Welcome to Hell.
Holy crap, it's you guys! Welcome to Hell! Hey hey! You brought me a soul. Nice work guys. Now I just need nine more. Let's go.
Hey, it's me, the Bombinomicon. Welcome to Hell. Hey, pow zoop, fight to the death.
Hey, you brought souls! Good stuff, you guys are the best.
Hey hey, kill each other! Oh you guys are the best. Not you Sniper.
Man, you guys are the best at Hell. I should know, I'm the Devil.
Man, I'm good being the Devil. See all that fire? That was my idea.
Everybody, take a knee. Dear God, thank you for making me the Devil, and putting all these great guys in Hell. Pow zoop!
Why don't you stay a while? Stay forever!" (laughs evilly) "I'm kidding." (whispers) "You guys are going to have go pretty soon.
Man, you guys are really killing each other. I'm the Devil, and I think it's pretty gruesome.
Man, I'm such a good Devil. They'll have to give me a hell-raise!" (laughter) "I am cracking myself up down here.
Hey, look at us. We all die together, in Hell. Yeah, it's pretty good.
So, trick or treat, ah? What are you guys supposed to be? Man everybody got a good costume this year. Come on up here and get some free crap.
One, two... Oh, man, there's a lot of you. Tell you what, thin the herd a little. I'll give you some gifts.
Oh, I got some good stuff for you guys, look at all this!
Is it hot in here or is it just me?" (laughs maliciously) "It's not me, we're in Hell.
Man, you guys got some nice souls. Tell you what, you kill each other, anybody who is still alive is gonna get some good stuff.
Hey, when you go back to Earth, make sure you tell everybody I'm the Devil now. Oh I'm gonna be famous. Oh, I'm gonna be more famous than Lord of the Rings!
Oh! Look at all this great crap I got here! How am I going to use all this crap? You guys should take some. I insist! You guys are the best.
You guys, hey, you guys! Be brutally honest, am I the best Devil?" *pause* "Ah! I knew it!" *joyous laughter* "Hell is so great, you guys.
Ah ha, that's right, killing each other!" (eager laughter) "Aw man, it makes me feel good to see you guys having so much fun.
So, how have you guys been doing? Soldier, still have that stupid wizard for a roommate? Oh, that guy, I could tell you some- You know what? You keep fighting, we catch up later.

Let me tell you, you guys are like the Tom Jones of tearing a dude's face off. That's not me talking, that's Tom Jones. Yeah, he down here. Tom, say something!" (laughs maliciously) "Who am I kidding? He's choking on a bottle of molten deer poop.

Okay, twist ending guys. Here comes the big twist! I'm an angel, and we're in Heaven!" (laughter) "This was a test all along!" (more laughter) "No, I'm pulling your leg, there is no Heaven. There is Hell in every direction.
Good gravel! I'm almost to hell, you idiots! Do something!
You charlatans promised me you'd send my brother to hell!
Blast! I should've hired the RED team!
Damn it all, get that ratstink carcass to hell! Or by gravel, I will end you!
What the gravel am I paying you for?
"What the gravel am I paying you for?" *stalemate theme*
Good gravel! You've almost done it!
Whatever it is you're doing, keep doing it!
Whatever it is you're doing, it's working!
I'm doing it! I'm finally actually really doing it! I am the best Mann!
I'm winning! And you're losing, Redmond! I will be the last man standing!
How do you like those ghostly apples, Redmond? No need to answer. They are bitter, tart ash in your mouth, I'm sure of it! Yes yes yes...
I'm doing it! I'm sending you to hell, Redmond! I'm the best brother!
Yes! All my beautiful ghost plans are being realized!
We're winning! Getting stabbed nine times in the heart was the greatest thing to ever happen to me!
Yes! Sending my brother to hell was my best idea since the pregnancy machine! ...Which isn't off the table, by the way.
We're winning! Do you hear me, Redmond? The Badlands are mine!
We're winning! Do you hear me, Redmond? You're going to hell!
Hell Island is open! The bridge is down!
Hurry! Cross the bridge to Hell Island! Get the good magic!
Hurry! Cross the bridge! Gather up the best spells!
The bridge! Across it lies power beyond imagination!
Don't settle for this paltry stuff! Cross the bridge!
What the gravel is happening down there?
Oh no, werewolves! No, wait... skeletons! Zombies? It doesn't matter, just run!
Hell zombies! Oh gravelpits, you are in for it now!
Zombies, no! Wait... Hold on, let me check it... Oh god! Hell zombies!
Oh no, it's the Skeleton King!
Oh good, the Skeleton King's here.
The Skeleton King! Ah gravelpits, you are in for it now!

Listen up, you thugs. This is Blutarch Mann speaking. I may be dead, but as long as you're cashing my checks, you'll damn well do what you're told. And I'm telling you, from beyond the grave, to push my brother to hell! Until I tell you to stop!

It is I, your employer, Blutarch Mann. From beyond the grave! I've given you thick-skulled slugs one thing to do for a hundred years now: Shoot each other! Now I'm giving you something even easier to do: Push my brother to hell!
This is Blutarch Mann speaking. That corpse belongs to my idiot brother. Send it to hell!
This is Blutarch Mann, with one simple request: Send my brother to hell!
This is Blutarch Mann speaking. Push! That! Cart!
I'm taking you to hell with me!
What am I paying you for?! Get my brother to hell!
Why is my brother not in hell yet?
Wait a minute... Am I closer to hell than my brother?
Drag your knuckles to that cart, you thick-browed member of the servant class!
Do you have any idea what ungodly sum I'm paying you vagrants to push a corpse a hundred feet?
All you have to do is push a haunted corpse on a railcart into a gaping hell-mouth! It's not gravel science.
Yeeees! The Witching Hour is upon us.
The Witching Hour! When the wall between worlds grows weak and withered!
It's midnight again. Oh, I hate this holiday!
"This update almost makes too much sense!" *laughing*
What the gravel am I paying you for? I'll tell you: I'm not! Unless you get my brother to hell!

All you have to do is send my brother's haunted corpse to hell, then run across a bridge to an enchanted island every time the clock strikes midnight every one and a half minutes to get powerful spells you can use to defeat your enemy, who will be doing the exact same thing, but with my haunted corpse! My only worry is this update makes too much sense.

"I am speaking to you from the great beyond! But make no mistake, my lawyers are still on Earth, and they will prosecute if you do not fulfill your contract. In fact, they're right over there in that evil castle! That's right! They built a terrifying mansion from which to conduct their day business!" *chuckle*
I sense a disturbance in the force... Hold on. Okay, I'm back. My lawyers tell me I'm sensing nothing.
Spells! Get them before they disappear!
Spells! They've spilled out of the hellhole!
Grab the spells and cast them!
Grab the spells! Cast them on Redmond's idiot army!
Yes, yes yes yes! I did it!
Rot in hell, Redmond! I win!
Mine! All of the Badlands is finally mine!
I am the last man standing!
Wait! Where are you all going?
I win! Now you can all go to hell!
"I won! And just so I don't have to pay you, you all can go to hell!" *long laughter* *coughing*
Sweet mother of gravel, we're winning!
We're winning! Do you hear me, Redmond? I'm winning!
Yes! I should've died years ago!
(Redmond) "Spells! Don't pick them up, they're all poison!" (Blutarch) "Don't listen to my idiot brother, get them!"
(Blutarch) "Spells! Don't pick them up, they're all poison!" (Redmond) "Don't listen to my idiot brother, get them!"
(Redmond) "Send my ratstink brother to hell!" (Blutarch) "Don't listen to him, send MY imbecile brother to hell!" (Redmond) "What? No! No!" (Blutarch) *short laugh*
(Redmond) "I hope you'll enjoy hell, Blutarch!" (Blutarch) "Yes, I'll enjoy staring down at it, from heaven! While you BURN, brother!" (Redmond) "Noooo!" (Blutarch) *short laugh*

(Redmond) "That gravel... It will be mine, Blutarch!" (Blutarch) "There is no gravel where you're going, brother!" (Redmond) "Oh? And where is that, exactly?" (Blutarch) "Hell, Redmond!" (Redmond) "What?" (Blutarch) "What do you think is going on here?"
(Blutarch) "Send my brother to hell!" (Redmond) "What? No! Don't do it!" (Blutarch) "DO do it!" (Redmond) "No!" (Blutarch) "Continue doing it!" (Redmond) "Nooooooo!"
(Redmond) "Send my brother to hell!" (Blutarch) "Don't do it!" (Redmond) "Do do it!" (Blutarch) "No!" (Redmond) "Continue doing it!" (Blutarch) "Nooooooo!"
(Redmond) "BLU team! Stop fighting! My brother and I call truce!" (Blutarch) "Shut up, Redmond!" (Redmond) *laughing* (Blutarch) "Keep fighting! Don't listen to my idiot brother!"
(Blutarch) "RED team! Stop fighting! My brother and I call truce!" (Redmond) "Shut up, Blutarch!" (Blutarch) *laughing* (Redmond) "Keep fighting! Don't listen to my idiot brother!"
(Redmond) "Look at your corpse, brother. As ugly in death as you were in life, so shriveled and red..." (Blutarch) "That's you, you imbecile!" (Redmond) "What? No!"
(Redmond) "Send him to hell! Who's the idiot brother now, brother?" (Blutarch) "You, Redmond!" (Redmond) "Nooooo!" (Blutarch) "Ha ha ha! I've turned it around on you!"

(Redmond) "I'll see you in hell, brother!" (Blutarch) "Only one of us is going to hell, Redmond!" (Redmond) "Then I suppose I won't see you in hell, brother!" (Blutarch) "I'm afraid I'll be the one not seeing you!" (Redmond) "We shall see." (Blutarch) "I won't!"
(Redmond) "The Witching Hour is over!" (Blutarch) "Don't listen to him!" (Redmond) *laughing* (Blutarch) "It's just beginning! It is the Witching Hour!"
(Blutarch) "The Witching Hour is over!" (Redmond) "Don't listen to him!" (Blutarch) *laughing* (Redmond) "It's just beginning! It is the Witching Hour!"
(Redmond) "I'm doing it, father! I'm winning!" (Blutarch) "Don't listen to him, father! It's still anyone's game right now!"
(Blutarch) "I'm doing it, father! I'm winning!" (Redmond) "Don't listen to him, father! It's still anyone's game right now!"
(Redmond) "Do you feel the flames of hell yet, brother?" (Blutarch) "I do, brother! It is the heat of victory!" (Redmond) "What? No! I feel it too! I only feel it!"

(Blutarch) "Yes! Pushing! I'm a tactical genius!" (Redmond) "What? I invented pushing years ago!" (Blutarch) "The only thing you invented years ago was losing to me right now!" (Redmond) "Noooooo!" (Blutarch) *laughing*

(Blutarch) "Dear Lord! This is Blutarch Mann speaking!" (Redmond) "And Redmond." (Blutarch) "Shut up, Redmond, I'm praying! Lord, please send my brother to hell. Amen." (Redmond) "Lord, wait! Whatever he's praying to you for, I'll double it." (Blutarch) "No!" (Redmond) "Ha ha ha ha! I win at praying, brother."

(Redmond) "Blutarch, we're family. Tell you what, on the count of three, let's both apologize and go to heaven. One, two, three. I'm-" (Blutarch) "I'm sorry. No!" (Redmond) *laughing* (Blutarch) "I meant I'm sorry that I'm sending you to hell!" (Redmond) "No!" (Blutarch) "And I'm not! Sorry!"

(Blutarch) "Knock knock." (Redmond) "Who is it?" (Blutarch) "Redmond, it's Blutarch! This is a knock knock joke! Open this door at once!" (Redmond) "No thank you." (Blutarch) "Redmond, I assure you I will make it worth your while. Now knock knock" (Redmond) "Who is it?" (Blutarch) "It's your brother Blutarch! Now for God's sake let me in! Someone's trying to send me to Hell!" (Redmond) "I'm trying to send you to Hell. *laughs* (Blutarch) "Good Lord! That changes everything! I'll finish the joke later!"

(Blutarch) *giggling* (Redmond) "What's so funny, brother?" (Blutarch) "Oh, I'm just thinking about all the gravel I'll have when you're gone." (Redmond) "And where do you intend to get all this gravel in hell, brother? While I'm on Earth, which is virtually made of gravel?" (Blutarch) "The devil! I plan to trade him all your gravel for it!" (Redmond) *gasps* "Don't you dare, Blutarch!"

(Blutarch) "Yes! Yes! Send my brother to hell!" (Redmond) "Wait, what was that?" (Blutarch) "I'm not talking to you, Redmond. I'm talking to the mercs!" (Redmond) "My mercs? Don't you dare! They've got a job!" (Blutarch) "Come on brother. What could they possibly be doing?" (Redmond) "Sending you to hell, Blutarch!" (Blutarch) "What? RED team! Stop what you're doing!" (Redmond) "Belay that order, RED team!"

(Redmond) "Yes! Yes! Send my brother to hell!" (Blutarch) "Wait, what was that?" (Redmond) "I'm not talking to you, Blutarch. I'm talking to the mercs!" (Blutarch) "My mercs? Don't you dare! They've got a job!" (Redmond) "Come on brother. What could they possibly be doing?" (Blutarch) "Sending you to hell, Redmond!" (Redmond) "What? BLU team! Stop what you're doing!" (Blutarch) "Belay that order, BLU team!"

(Redmond) "You there! BLU team! I'll double what my ratstink brother is paying you!" (Blutarch) "You imbecile!" *shuffling noise* (Blutarch) "This is what I'm paying them!" (Redmond) "Geh! Never mind!"
(Blutarch) "You there! RED team! I'll double what my ratstink brother is paying you!" (Redmond) "Blutarch!" *shuffling noise* (Redmond) "This is what I'm paying them!" (Blutarch) "Ah! Never mind!"
(Redmond) "Look at me now, father!" (Zepheniah Mann) "You did great, son." (Redmond) "Yes, yes! Yes yes yes!" (Zepheniah) "Gray is still my favorite though." (Redmond) "What? No!"
(Blutarch) "Look at me now, father!" (Zepheniah) "You did great, son." (Blutarch) "Yes, yes, yes, yes!" (Zepheniah) "Gray is still my favorite though." (Blutarch) "No! Noooo!"
Good gravel! I'm almost to hell, you idiots! Do something!
Good gravel! You've almost done it!
The bridge, you fools! Get the good magic...
Hell Island is open! The bridge is down!
Hurry! Cross the bridge to Hell Island! That's where the good spells are!
The bridge, you lackeys! I sense great magic...
The bridge! Across it lies power beyond imagination!
Don't settle for this paltry stuff! Cross the bridge!
Hurry! Cross the bridge! Gather up the best spells!
Oh no, werewolves! No, wait... skeletons! Zombies? It doesn't matter, just run!
Zombies, no! Wait... " *muttering* "Hold on, let me check... Oh god! Hell zombies!
The Skeleton King! Oh... gravelpits, you are in for it now!
Oh good, the Skeleton King's he- NO! That's bad!

This is Redmond Mann speaking from an unspecified location beyond the grave. I may be dead, but as long as you're cashing my checks, you'll damn well do what you're told. And I'm telling you to push my brother to hell!

It is I, your employer, Redmond Mann, from beyond the grave. I've given you thick-skulled slugs one thing to do for a hundred years now: Shoot each other. Now I'm giving you something even easier to do: Push that cart!
This is Redmond Mann, and I've got one simple request: Send my brother to hell!
This is your employer, and I've got a job for you: Send my brother to hell!
Listen up you reprobates. This is Redmond Mann. That corpse belongs to my idiot brother. Send it to hell!
Listen up you thugs. This is Redmond Mann speaking. And I've got a job for you: Send my brother to hell!
I'm taking you to hell with me!
Blast! I should've hired the BLU team!
We're behind! Fight harder, you imbeciles!
Fight, you nincompoops! They're beating us!
Why is my brother not in hell yet?
What am I paying you for? Push my brother to hell!
Wait a minute... Am I closer to hell than my brother?
You charlatans promised me you'd send my brother to hell!
Damn it all, get that ratstink carcass to hell! Or by gravel, I will end you!
What the gravel am I paying you for?
"What the gravel am I paying you for?" *stalemate theme*
You unwashed reprobates! It's not gravel science!
It's midnight! Gather spells while you can!
Yes, the Witching Hour is upon us!
The Witching Hour! When the wall between worlds grows thin!
It's midnight again! Gather spells while you can!
Grab the spells and cast them!
Grab the spells! Cast them on Blutarch's idiot army!
"Good! The spells have appeared, just as I planned! Yes... yes! This update almost makes too much sense!" *laughs*
Yes! Yes yes yes yes! I did it!
"Yes! Yes yes yes yes! I did it!" *victory theme*
Rot in hell, Blutarch! I win!
Look at me now, father! I won!
Mine! All of the Badlands is finally mine!
After a hundred years, I am the last man standing!
I won! Wait, where are you all going?
I won! Now you all can go to hell!
"I won! And just so I don't have to pay you, go to hell!" *laughs*
Sweet mother of gravel, we're winning!
Whatever it is you're doing, keep doing it!
Whatever it is you're doing, it's working!
We're winning! Do you hear me, Blutarch! I'm winning!
I'm doing it! I'm finally actually really doing it! I am the best Mann!
I'm winning! And you're losing, Blutarch! I will be the last man standing!
How do you like those ghostly apples, Blutarch? No need to answer. They are bitter, tart ash in your mouth, I'm sure of it! Yes, yes, yes yes yes...
We're winning! Do you hear me, Blutarch? The Badlands are mine!
We're winning! Do you hear me, Blutarch? I'm the best son!
I'm doing it! I'm sending you to hell, Blutarch!
Yes! I should've died years ago!
Yes! All of my beautiful ghost plans are being realized!
We're winning! Getting stabbed nine times in the heart was the greatest thing to ever happen to me!
Yes! Sending my brother to hell was my best idea since the pregnancy machine! ...Which isn't off the table, by the way.
Wow, that was really, REALLY good!
You...you impressed Merasmus with this one!
Merasmus does not impress easily. But you've done it, mortal! You impressed the big dog.
Merasmus does not impress easily. But you've done it! Mortal, you, you impressed the big dog.
For someone who has lived but one lifetime, mortal...you're pretty good at this!
You...hmm, wow! I mean, just wow! Do you not have a...day job! Seriously, that's...wow!
[slurring] Look! Merasmus's had a few cocktails! But you are the best, man! Seriously I...I love you, man!
Merasmus isn't going to lie to you: that was reeeeally good!

Fool! I...ah...good work. I don't even know why I'm calling you a fool half the time. It's just...you know Meramsus is into  the Russian mob for a...reeeally lot of money. (light chuckle) They say they're going to cut Merasmus' fingers off. (chuckle) His fingers! Heh heh. Heh. Maybe Merasmus is the real fool. (nervous chuckle)
Begone contract! A mortal has bested you!
I return this contract from the stink pit from whence it came!
You have bested my challenge, mortal!
You have conquered my curs'd contract!
You have triumphed over my terrifying terror task!
Here's a contract I like to call: 'Your certain doom!'
I hope your soul's in good shape, mortal! Because when you fail at this, I'll be taking it off your hands! (laughter)
You will never beat me! And I will claim your soul!
You dare to fight me? Oh mortal, this is going to be embarrassing!
So you think you've got what it takes to beat Merasmus, eh? Your funeral, mortal! Your sparsely attended pauper's funeral!
Your challenge is to defeat me! But you can't! And when you fail, I'll take your soul!
(cackling) That's all I have to say about this next contract! Oh wait, one more thing! Awoooo!
Your next target is me! Merasmus!
Your next target: me! (laughter) Awoooo! (more laughter)
Cower mortal, before the eldritch horror of the abject terror of the monstrous magic...of Merasmus!
You next infernal contract is...hold on...let's see...killing...me. Huh. I am surprised I put that one in there.
Either you kill my past self and I get my soul, or my past self kills you and I get yours! (laughter) I don't *BLEEEP* care! I'm all about souls tonight!
Should you fail mortal, you'll be in breach of contract. And I shall seek compensation, in the form of your soul! (laughter) And financial...compensation. Merasmus is living at the Y.
That's a nice soul you have there! It would be a shame if a wizard were to claim it, when you fail this mission!

Bet you'll win this contract? Would you wager your very soul? (cackling) Please note that I'm not explicitly threatening you or you'll be agreeing to this contract under duress. That..wooo..that would not be good for Merasmus.
Exterior: A graveyard. We zoom in on a corpse holding a bloodstained contract. The corpse is yours! That's right! Merasmus has been working on a great screenplay!

Ah ha ha ha ha, mortal! Can you murder Merasmus, himself? And if it's not too much trouble, can you do it before the Russian mob does it? Because they have made it really quite clear that they are not going to kill Merasmus quickly.
This contract is 100%, word-for-word, exactly Charles Dickens' Halloween classic: A Christmas Carol. Prepare to meet the ghost of Merasmus Past! The copyright lapsed! Awoooo!
If you meet your doom in this next contract, thank Merasmus! And if you can read this infernal contract, thank a teacher! It's important work. They're underpaid. Happy Halloween everybody!
To HELL with you and your soul!
Fool! You are a successful fool somehow!
You? Beat Merasmus? You know what, keep your soul! It's probably got garbage and dirt in it!
What? How did you do that!
What? You beat me? Merasmus demands a recount!
You beat me? Noooo! I almost had your soul!
I didn't even want your stink soul!
You won? How did you win?
You have got to be kidding Merasmus.
My debt to the Russian mob passes...to you! (wicked laughter)

You may have killed me. But you're still a foo...hold on. What's that Gandalf? Uh huh. Gandalf wants you to know he's here in Wizard Heaven with me. Because he dies in the book. So we both hope that spoils that for you. Yes. Oh, and Harry Potter's here too.
Wait, wait, wait. Merasmus lagged. Do over.
Too slow mortal! The Gargoyle, is gone!
The Gargoyle has vanished to another realm!
Not fast enough! The Gargoyle is gone!
You took too long! The Gargoyle has moved!
A Gargoyle is somewhere on the map!
An accursed agreement, HAS BEEN STRUCK!
A dark contract rises from its legal slumber!
A Merasmission from the dank depths of the depraved debts!
A Merasmission spewed from the drooling, stupid mouth, of madness!
Evil Contract Delivery! Return address: THE BLACK ABYSS!
A half-glimpsed Merasmission, beckons from the shadows!
What loathsome horrors lurk within the watermarked pages of this contract!?
Were I to utter the details of this contract aloud, the tiny world you know would be rent asunder! Welcome to your nightmare, mortal! READING!

Don't look too closely at this Merasmission! It is infested with a host of Hellworms; your human scientists would call Silverfish! Yes mortal, there was significant water damage in Merasmus' storage unit!

What's that sound? Is it the scratching of fingernails on a casket lid, because they were buried alive? They might just be... Oh wait mortal, where are your fingers! Look down! That's right! It was you buried in that coffin! The whole *BLEEEP* time!
Practice evil itself! Though not legally enforceable. Merasmus didn't go to law school. He got his diploma on the streets; the streets of HELL!
A gibbous moon hangs pendulously in the night sky! It thinks you cannot finish this contract! Dare you make the moon look stupid?
